description:
Unpack your perfect life in this cozy, hygge-inspired home simulator.
Design the apartment of your dreams in a relaxing and meditative experience focused on creativity, comfort, and personal expression.

Create a unique home with two layers, decorate each room to match your mood, and even design your garden or outdoor area. Arrange furniture, experiment with color combinations, and customize the atmosphere outside your window with changing light and weather.

Whether you’re crafting a minimalistic loft, a soft Scandinavian bedroom, or a mysterious mage’s basement, this is your space to shape freely.

Features:
	•	A calm and cozy simulator inspired by hygge living
	•	Unpack and place furniture with intuitive controls
	•	Customize walls, floors, lighting, and window views
	•	Design indoor and outdoor spaces, including gardens
	•	Create multi-layer homes with vertical layouts
	•	Complete relaxing design quests with unique themes
	•	Enjoy a peaceful and stress-free environment

In a chaotic world, your hygge room is your shelter.
